commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The blocking defects have a bounded mechanical repair path on the PR branch; automation should narrow and rebase the patch but must not independently choose a permanent public SDK contract.; Needs attention: The guarded URL-download design uses the correct SSRF-aware seam, but the unrelated dependency graph change is a concrete supply-chain blocker and same-origin credential reuse needs exact-head owner rev..... (sha=80b70db0991a33503fc054ae023f97da96a27ac2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Windows QMD command resolution, adds guarded downloads for URL-backed OpenAI-compatible image responses, expands related plugin SDK helpers, and also carries memory-timeout, dependency, and incidental cleanup changes.

PR surface: Source +308, Tests +545, Docs 0, Config +1, Other +65. Total +919 across 29 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for URL responses and the older QMD package layout, but current upstream QMD now has a different Windows-compatible launcher and no live current-main or exact-head QMD indexing/search reproduction was established.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocking defects have a bounded mechanical repair path on the PR branch; automation should narrow and rebase the patch but must not independently choose a permanent public SDK contract.

target.title: fix: resolve QMD Windows shims and guard image URL downloads
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes the Windows QMD shim path and narrows the image URL work into a guarded provider-download path.

- Resolve Windows `.cmd` shims that point at quoted absolute JavaScript entrypoints.
- Use the real QMD package name, `@tobilu/qmd`, for package-bin fallback resolution.
- Parse OpenAI-compatible image responses that return `data[].url` instead of `data[].b64_json`.
- Route provider-returned image URLs through guarded HTTP with bounded reads, MIME validation, scoped same-origin transport reuse, configured media limits, and operation-deadline timeouts.
- Dropped the unrelated `node-llama-cpp` dependency/lockfile churn from the original PR scope.

## Behavior addressed

Windows QMD availability checks no longer fail when `qmd.cmd` wraps a quoted absolute Node entrypoint instead of a `%~dp0`-relative entrypoint. OpenAI-compatible URL-backed image generation responses now produce image assets without using raw fetch or broad private-network carryover.

## Real environment tested

- AWS Crabbox native Windows: `cbx_36917d25d801`, run `run_0dd48bf72083`, hydrate workflow `26722175678`.
- AWS Crabbox Windows WSL2: `cbx_92cdb109d982`, run `run_740f8e92e641`, hydrate workflow `26721781232`.
- AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate after rebase: `cbx_0b074a7498e9`, run `run_72f46782c53c`.

## Exact steps or command run after this patch

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/windows-spawn.test.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/qmd-process.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts src/image-generation/image-assets.test.ts src/image-generation/openai-compatible-image-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/image-generation-provider.test.ts
node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check
node scripts/docs-list.js
node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-subpath-exports.mjs
git diff --check
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Native Windows and WSL2 ran the same focused Vitest set on hydrated Crabbox workspaces. The final Linux changed gate was run after rebasing onto current `origin/main`.

## Evidence after fix

- Local post-rebase focused tests: 6 shards passed, 218 tests total.
- Native Windows Crabbox focused tests: 6 shards passed, 213 tests total on `run_0dd48bf72083`.
- WSL2 Crabbox focused tests: 6 shards passed, 215 tests total on `run_740f8e92e641`.
- Plugin SDK API baseline check passed after regenerating the baseline across the final rebase.
- SDK subpath export check passed.
- Autoreview passed clean after the URL-download security/timeout/boundary fixes.

## Observed result after fix

- Quoted absolute Windows `.cmd` QMD shims resolve to direct Node execution without shell fallback.
- Scoped QMD package fallback resolves through `@tobilu/qmd`.
- URL-backed OpenAI-compatible image responses are accepted and converted into generated image assets.
- Cross-origin provider-returned URLs do not inherit provider private-network/dispatcher/auth policy.
- Same-origin provider-returned URLs keep provider auth/transport policy and still use guarded fetch.
- URL downloads honor configured generated-media byte limits and share the image operation deadline instead of resetting timeout per download.

## What was not tested

Full live QMD memory indexing/search was not run. The final `pnpm check:changed` gate is blocked by a current `origin/main` type error in untouched `src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts` from `b0679d1f13d`; this PR does not touch channel ingress queue files.
target.author: knightplat-blip

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
